title: Forge authz-map (endpoint → policy declaration)
description: Declarative list of API endpoints and the authorization policy that governs each (REQ-14, design §2.4). Every endpoint MUST declare a negative_contract_test reference — this is the declarative half of the anti-false-negative triad (static gate + negative contract test + consumer CI decision-log evidence): a gate that proves only PEP import, never PEP application (see graph-govern.mjs).
